description: When a Special Element is generated, roll on this table. Most results modify existing Elements on the List in some way. Used with the Event Crafter system from Mythic Magazine #62.

descriptionTranslations.en: When a Special Element is generated, roll on this table. Most results modify existing Elements on the List in some way. Used with the Event Crafter system from Mythic Magazine #62.

entries.description: Roll in the Category again (if you get Special, treat it as Expected). Interpret the Element with increased intensity, making it more impactful.

descriptionTranslations.en: Roll in the Category again (if you get Special, treat it as Expected). Interpret the Element with increased intensity, making it more impactful.

entries.description: Roll in the Category again (if you get Special, treat it as Expected). Interpret the Element with less intensity, making it less impactful.

descriptionTranslations.en: Roll in the Category again (if you get Special, treat it as Expected). Interpret the Element with less intensity, making it less impactful.

entries.description: Roll in the Category again (if you get Special, treat it as Expected). Interpret the Element as unfortunate or negative for the Player Character.

descriptionTranslations.en: Roll in the Category again (if you get Special, treat it as Expected). Interpret the Element as unfortunate or negative for the Player Character.

entries.description: Roll in the Category again (if you get Special, treat it as Expected). Interpret the Element as fortunate or beneficial for the Player Character.

descriptionTranslations.en: Roll in the Category again (if you get Special, treat it as Expected). Interpret the Element as fortunate or beneficial for the Player Character.

entries.description: Roll twice in the Category (if you get Special, treat it as Expected) and include both Elements in this Event.

descriptionTranslations.en: Roll twice in the Category (if you get Special, treat it as Expected) and include both Elements in this Event.

entries.description: Add 3 Progress Points to this Category instead of 1 Point for this roll. Otherwise treat this as an Expected Element.

descriptionTranslations.en: Add 3 Progress Points to this Category instead of 1 Point for this roll. Otherwise treat this as an Expected Element.

entries.description: Subtract 2 Progress Points from this Category and don't add 1 for this roll. Otherwise treat this as an Expected Element.

descriptionTranslations.en: Subtract 2 Progress Points from this Category and don't add 1 for this roll. Otherwise treat this as an Expected Element.

entries.description: Treat this Special Element like a Random Element, rolling on your choice of Meaning Tables and interpreting the results.

descriptionTranslations.en: Treat this Special Element like a Random Element, rolling on your choice of Meaning Tables and interpreting the results.
